_description: Credentials template for LocalVex Media n8n workflows. Replace all placeholder values with your actual credentials. DO NOT commit this file with real credentials to version control.
_instructions: 1. Copy this file and rename to credentials-actual.json (add to .gitignore)
2. Fill in each credential section below
3. In n8n, go to Settings → Credentials → Add New for each type
4. Reference the credential names in your workflow nodes

ghl_api_key.name: GoHighLevel API Key
ghl_api_key.notes: Get from GHL → Settings → Business Profile → API Key. Used by all 5 workflows.

ghl_ids.name: GoHighLevel IDs (not a credential — reference values)
ghl_ids.notes: Find these in GHL → Settings → Pipelines. Click each stage to get the ID from the URL. Replace the {{GHL_PIPELINE_ID}} and {{GHL_STAGE_ID}} placeholders in workflow JSON files.

smtp_email.name: Gmail SMTP
smtp_email.notes: Use a Gmail App Password (not your regular password). Go to Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App Passwords. Used by workflows 2, 3, 4, 5.

smtp_email_mailgun_alternative.name: Mailgun SMTP (Alternative)
smtp_email_mailgun_alternative.notes: Alternative to Gmail. Higher sending limits. Get credentials from Mailgun Dashboard → Sending → Domains → SMTP.

facebook_app.name: Facebook App Credentials
facebook_app.notes: Create at developers.facebook.com. Required for Workflow 1 (FB Lead Ads). The VERIFY_TOKEN is a string you make up — it must match what you enter in the Facebook webhook config.

google_sheets_oauth2.name: Google Sheets OAuth2
google_sheets_oauth2.notes: Create OAuth2 credentials in Google Cloud Console. Enable Google Sheets API. Used by Workflow 5 (Review Request → log to Sheets). In n8n, add the credential and click 'Connect' to complete OAuth flow.

google_review_link.name: Google Review Link
google_review_link.notes: Get from Google Business Profile → Home → Get more reviews → Share review form. Replace {{GOOGLE_REVIEW_LINK_PLACEHOLDER}} in Workflow 5.
